retrieved_result: Get the latest LGBTQ news to your inbox every Thursday!  (Screenshot via Ellentube)Ellen De Generes is being sued for poking fun at a real estate agent’s name during a segment of “What’s Wrong With These Ads… And These Signs?” on her talk show. Daily Mail reports De Generes mocked Titi Pierce’s name by calling her “Titty Pierce” when reading from an adve
Decision_Reason: The content is about LGBTQ news and a lawsuit, unrelated to top IDEs for software development.
